ddls:
CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "iso_639_2_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-2 code for the language */,
  "iso_639_1_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  "english_name" TEXT /* English name of the language */,
  "french_name" TEXT /* French name of the language */,
  "german_name" TEXT /* German name of the language */,
  "language_status" TEXT /* Status of the language */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family */,
  "language_branch" TEXT /* Language branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the language is spoken */,
  "dialects" TEXT /* Dialects of the language */,
  "historical_info" TEXT /* Historical information about the language */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Number of native speakers */,
  "script" TEXT /* Writing system used by the language */,
  "literacy_rate" TEXT /* Literacy rate of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_metadata_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "project_funding" TEXT /* Funding agency or organization */,
  "project_collaborators" TEXT /* Names of collaborators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_languages" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language associated with the project */,
  "project_language_role" TEXT /* Role of the language in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., research paper, audio recording) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institute) */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution or affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., principal investigator, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio recording */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "recording_title" TEXT /* Title of the audio recording */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio recording */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the recording was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_recordings_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video transcript */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "transcript_title" TEXT /* Title of the video transcript */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the video transcript */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the transcript was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_transcripts_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_ancestors" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "ancestor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ancestral language */,
  "ancestral_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the language and its ancestor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id", "ancestor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_regions" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ancestral_languages" (
  "ancestor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ancestral language */,
  "ancestor_name" TEXT /* Name of the ancestral language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ancestral language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ancestor_id")
)
